metadata.description: Legal and financial document automation for Claude Code

plugins.name: doc-radar
plugins.description: Scans Gmail and watched folders for legal/financial documents. Extracts dates, deduplicates via SHA-256, logs to JSONL, creates Google Calendar events with tiered reminders.

plugins.name: doc-radar-cowork
plugins.description: MCP-native version of doc-radar for the Claude desktop app. Scans Gmail and watched folders for legal/financial documents using Gmail and Calendar MCP connectors. No CLI installation required.
